drivers.notes: Active Ridge Technology (ART) surround, PPA lens

description.en: Flagship three-way 4-driver tower in Paradigm's Premier line — same X-PAL tweeter as the 700F but scaled up to a 165 mm dedicated midrange and two 165 mm woofers, all carbon-infused polypropylene with Active Ridge Technology surround. Crossovers at 700 Hz and 2.5 kHz; reaches 27 Hz at DIN extension with 89 dB anechoic sensitivity, comfortably driven by 15–250 W amplifiers.
description.es: Torre tope de tres vías y 4 drivers de la línea Premier de Paradigm — mismo tweeter X-PAL que el 700F pero escalado con un midrange dedicado de 165 mm y dos woofers de 165 mm, todos carbon-infused polypropylene con suspensión Active Ridge Technology. Crossovers a 700 Hz y 2.5 kHz; llega a 27 Hz (DIN) con 89 dB de sensibilidad anechoic, cómodo con amplis de 15 a 250 W.
